ops.body: T3 in progress. Pre-flight all green: v0.13.0 released (tag on 4e8c9525, all 4 CI workflows + release-pypi green; wheel smoked isolated AND via the exact plist command shape — note: uv served a stale "unsatisfiable" from a negative cache entry until --no-cache/--refresh busted it); launchd agents reinstalled with --journal-repo (retrain plist now carries WorkingDirectory=/Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer); guarded re-prune of the nightly re-pollution (2595 pruned, convergence 0); re-export --push clean with the new gate-view invariant (gate 13633/1341, watcher 6288/637 incl. today's accrual; frozen frame untouched per the refreeze rule). GATE LANE PROMOTED: v002-20260716-b76e7342c983, fresh-epoch (no incumbent), pr_auc=0.9007 ece=0.3840 recall@2/100=0.0252 threshold=0.9985 — honest clean-frame numbers (the old 0.9361 was measured against the corrupted frame). Watcher lane running now on Tinker under the $15 cap.
